data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm that the system auto-deletes bookings 24 hours after the scheduled meeting. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or mechanisms that explicitly demonstrate this functionality. The linked use case mentions that the temporary link expires after the meeting, but it does not confirm the auto-deletion of the booking itself after 24 hours, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of auto-deletion of bookings 24 hours after the scheduled meeting.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
